creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
nox         2011-07-30 23:06:47 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel/mspdebug       Makefile distinfo 
    devel/mspdebug/files patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  Update to version 0.16:
  
  * Support for new chips: MSP430G2252, MSP430G2553, MSP430F235,
    MSP430F427.
  * Added GDB client driver.
  * Added support for Olimex MSP-JTAG-TINY rev 2.
  * Bug fix in flash-bsl driver for large memory transfers.
  
  PR:             ports/159318
  Submitted by:   Peter Jeremy <peterjeremy@acm.org> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3       +1 -1      ports/devel/mspdebug/Makefile
  1.3       +2 -2      ports/devel/mspdebug/distinfo
  1.3       +11 -2     ports/devel/mspdebug/files/patch-Makefile
